feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Contracts
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Contracts Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Question about Ariba contracts events
entry.content:
Hi team.

We are working with SAP Ariba contracts. In resume, the contract is created and it is ready to be signed; this creates a pending task to do that.
Using Ariba APIs we are able to poll those pending tasks and sign them with a third system (different to docusign and adobe).
My question is, In Ariba is there any way to trigger an event to notify the pending task created, via web service to an external endpoint?
We would like to trigger the process to sign with an event and avoid polling, because this takes more time in an user perspective.

Best regards!
Oscar I.

SAP Ariba Contracts

entry.title: Strategy to resolve taxes not being sent correctly on Ariba
entry.content:
What would be the best way to fix this type of error?

NV-54: Comments from Wal-Mart Stores, Inc.: Error in IDOC data
INV-54: Comments from Wal-Mart Stores, Inc.: Assigning a new tax key for QST and VAT not possible
INV-54: Comments from Wal-Mart Stores, Inc.: Assigning a new tax key for GST and VAT not possible

entry.title: Need maximum permissible limit to configure number of amendment phases in contract template
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have already configured Contract workspace template.

This contains 10 amendment phases, Amendment phases were added by referring support document 'How do I set up amendment tasks' (method3). All steps were followed as given in the document.

In many contracts, these 10 amendment phases are already used or exhausted. We want to add maximum amendment phases to avoid this situation in near future.

Requirement:-

1 'How many maximum amendment phases?' we can configure. What is the maximum permissible limit to configure amendment phases? This limit is not mentioned in the support document. 

2. If we can not configure the amendment phases beyond certain limit, can we configure Approval task with 'Repeat for each draft' for some volatile nature of commodities? This Approval task will be parallel/additional to earlier arrangement  for certain commodities.

Please provide your valuable response.

entry.title: Repository of documents in guided sourcing
entry.content:
Hi,

Our client is looking for a repository that could store template documents or any documents that is related to Sourcing and Contracts. This repository should be accessible to all users that they can access from projects. In addition, they want to have the users capable to add new documents and if possible, to have messaging functionality. 

We have explored Knowledge Projects; however, it is currently available on Classic Sourcing, but we are using Guided Sourcing. We are looking for other ways that we can store document and can be accessed in Guided Sourcing.

Hope someone could help us on this. Thank you.

entry.title: Does Ariba have an inbox?
entry.content: Does Ariba have an inbox? as I get notifications saying so.

entry.title: Contract ID range in Contract Compliance
entry.content:
Can you tell me if there is definition of ID range for Contract in Contract Compliance?

I see it starts from C1 and currently it has 3 digits after C, will it increase if number of contract exceeds 999? Will it be C1000 next and until what digit can it have?

@shakir

entry.title: Looking to create a condition in the contract request approval flow
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone confirm if there is a way to create a condition in the contract request approval flow that would utilize the amendment type selection in the contract workspace, specifically "Renewal".

entry.title: SAP Ariba: Export of Ariba Data - Data Warehouse (Data Strategy)
entry.content:
Hello ~ I am reaching out with this question to the SAP Ariba SCM community. We are using SAP Ariba Sourcing, Contracts, Buying, and Invoicing and are exploring options to export the data and land it in our data warehouse. This was attempted a couple of years ago with the creation of templates and exporting data via Analytical API. However, there are challenges with this approach: 1) Keeping Ariba record changes and deletions in synch with the DW; 2) Analytical API limits are reached due to high volumes of data; and 3) Templates that contain vector fields have a lower Analytical API limit (5,000 per day). Also, as an FYI, our ERP system is PeopleSoft Financials.
If you have successfully implemented an SAP Ariba data strategy with the export of data to a DW, I would really appreciate a response to this post. We are open to all ideas - internal middleware development using SAP Ariba APIs, SAP solutions, non-SAP solutions, etc. Thank you!

entry.title: How to create schedule lines in CLID template under scheduling agreement in SAP Ariba Contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to create CLID template for Scheduling Agreement, we know at header lever, we have options of Document Category - Scheduling Agreement and Document Type - LP/LPA.

We want to know how to add schedule lines in CLID templates for scheduling agreement in SAP Ariba Contract and how Line item template changes for scheduling agreement.?

Please provide support document to create CLID template with schedule line for scheduling agreement.

Regards

Amit R Nagwekar

entry.title: How to extract contract attcahments via API
entry.content:
I have a requirement to extract all the attachments related to all contracts/ a specific contracts via an API , I have gone through the APIs available on contracts and couldn't find any thing relevant.
Can someone please guide on how to extract the Contract documents(word/pdf/ etc..) through API ?

entry.title: what is IMS-4483 ?
entry.content: I am trying to send a set of documents through Ariba but got a big date difference between transmissions and saw that the acknowledgment date was a week later normally it is the same day.

entry.title: Transfer of contract text/terms to PR or PO in Ariba
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement for overarching and specific contract information to transfer from the Ariba Contract to any PR/PO that is created in reference to said contract.

This is similar to the functionality in S4/ECC where data from outline agreements transfers to POs at header or item level.

Is it possible to do this in Ariba?

entry.title: How can I third party integration with BTP in SAP Ariba Contract Management for e-signature process?
entry.content:
Hello,

 
I want to ask about a design procedure about BTP. We can establish e-signature integration within Contract Management. However, this integration is only possible with Docusign and AdobeSign in the standard ariba process. These two e-signature programs are not legally accepted in Turkey, so our customer does not want to use these e-signature solutions. They have their own e-signature programs and want to use them. When we did our research, we saw that we could do this design with BTP (Business Technology Platform).  How can we do this design? If there is a document, or a KBA, explaining how to establish third-party integration with BTP, can you please direct to me?
 
Best Regards.

entry.title: How to reopen a closed contract in Ariba CMS
entry.content:
Hello All,

When I try to reopen a closed contract in Ariba with Amendment of type amendment and also with type republish I am getting proxy error as below. Please suggest a resolution to reopen the closed contract.

Proxy Error

The proxy server received an invalid response from an upstream server.
The proxy server could not handle the request

Reason: Error reading from remote server

entry.title: Muğla Menteşe Matematik Özel Ders Hocası: 0546 479 72 15
entry.content: Muğla Menteşe'de her seviye matematik dersi verilir. 0546 479 72 15 numaradan bana ulaşabilirsiniz. (Umut) Matematik, birçok öğrenci için hem zorlu hem de karmaşık bir alan olabilir. Bu noktada, konuları anlamanıza yardımcı olacak bir rehber arıyorsanız, Muğla Menteşe'de özel matematik dersi veren Umut Hoca size büyük bir destek sağlayabilir.

entry.title: Docusig CLM integration Ariba Contracts
entry.content:
I'm trying to set up the integration between Ariba Contracts and Docusign CLM but in Ariba I need to add some specific information; Specifies the URL context that is being integrated with SAP Ariba Contracts and Specifies the hostname that is being integrated with SAP Ariba Contracts.  I've looking informtacion about wich information the system needs but no luck so far, Does any body have an idea wich information is needed?

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Ariba: Contracts why is there no Learning System
entry.content:
Hi,

Part of signing up for a subscription to the learning hub and was clearly advertised that there were practice systems to help with your learning

Unless I am missing something there are no learning systems for SAP Ariba Contracts to help with the certification in this area which is really disappointing

Am I missing something and does anyone know why?

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Ariba Contracts Certification Contains lessons that say Sourcing
entry.content:
Hi,

I am studing the SAP Ariba Contracts implementation consultant certification. As part of the lessons that need to be studied it has two modules that refer to SAP Ariba Strategic Sourcing. I have been through the lessons and it seems that the content is generic across the strategic sourcing suite which I think includes Contracts.

Can anyone confirm that this isn't an error and I do have the correct modules showing. It is quite confusing when you see the titles especially as SAP Ariba Sourcing is a certification in itself.

Thanks

entry.title: Ariba CLID Integration to SAP S/4 Hana On-prem
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on the Ariba CLID Integration with SAP S/4 HANA on-prem. We have enabled the required parameters in ICM and able to see the Send to External System option in Ariba Contract workspace against the Line-item document. We have maintained the required master data in the External system integration and after we click on send to External system, we get a success message also in Contract Workspace.

However, we are not able to see this triggering any document in CIG or Business network, its like we clicked on Send to External system and nothing triggered on the system. Can some one please throw some light on what are we missing here? Once we click on Send to External system, where should we check the Contract is sent to S/4 Or not or how to trouble shoot?

NOTE: I went through the standard links in help.sap.com, but there were not helpful, any help on this would be very much appreciated.

 

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Spend Control Tower: does it bring through other Ariba data from upstream? e.g. sourcing/contract?
entry.content: Interested in finding out more about Spend Tower.  As far as I understand it will eventually replace Ariba Spend Analysis - and the pre-configured dashboards look ok if a bit limited.  I really want to know if contract spend is something that will be included.
